title: Codex 2026 Prompting and Repository Practice · Contract Clinic: Codex Config Surfaces
summary: Apply current Codex guidance across CLI, IDE, app, planning, and repository instructions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt codex config surfaces increment in a Codex-specific prompt and AGENTS.md package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate prompt instructions, AGENTS.md, skills, MCP, hooks, and config by scope and enforcement need.
Place recurring build, test, lint, review, and boundary guidance in the nearest applicable AGENTS.md.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
